name: libzaungast-native
description: Optional native (Rust) accelerator for libzaungast: reads the Teams leveldb dir and writes the ChatStore SQLite file end-to-end. Install alongside libzaungast to opt into the native engine via createNativeEngine(); libzaungast never depends on it.

scripts.build: napi build --platform --release --features napi --js index.cjs --dts index.d.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:debug: napi build --platform --features napi --js index.cjs --dts index.d.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.json
